# withLeadingSlash

## Usage

```js twoslash
// @twoslash-cache: {"v":1,"hash":"e739e48f533d6a4c805a6b31d85e57ecb9eec36c11dfc30d97a0b9d59205e9b2","data":""}
import { withLeadingSlash } from '@studiometa/js-toolkit/utils';

withLeadingSlash('string'); // "/string"
withLeadingSlash('/string'); // "/string"
```

### Parameters

- `string` (`string`): The string to modify.

### Return value

- `string`: The modified string.
